//copy: Copy the entry under mcpServers into ../.mcp.json and rename it (e.g. outlook-work).
//server: Example uses an MS-Graph-based Outlook MCP server. Verify the exact package on the MCP registry and adjust command/args to match the one you choose.
//auth: Register an app in Azure AD (Entra ID), grant Mail.ReadWrite / Mail.Send, and create a client secret. Put the IDs/secret in .env.
//secrets: Add the env vars below to your .env (and .env.example).
